mapper.select: select session_id, project_id, user_id, session_type, chapter_id, title, create_time, update_time from novel_ai_session where session_id = #{sessionId}
mapper.insert: insert into novel_ai_session (project_id, user_id, session_type, chapter_id, title, create_time) values (#{projectId}, #{userId}, #{sessionType}, #{chapterId}, #{title}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update novel_ai_session set update_time = sysdate() where session_id = #{sessionId}
